summary: Iteration 152 - SMS Messages moved from Terminal to Main App. All tests passed. /messages page loads with 5 tabs (Message Queue, Compose, Promo Blast, Templates, Settings). SMS Messages nav item visible in sidebar under Management section for admin users only (adminOnly:true flag). Terminal mode selector no longer shows Messages option (correctly removed from TABS array). Backend SMS APIs all working (22/22 tests passed).
critical_code_review_comments: MessagesPage.js correctly implements all 5 tabs: Message Queue, Compose, Promo Blast, Templates, Settings
Message Queue tab has Pending/Sent/Failed/Skipped status filters with counts from stats API
Pending messages show 'Mark Sent' and 'Skip' buttons
Compose tab has customer search, message textarea (320 char limit), Queue Message button
Promo Blast tab has min_balance filter, branch display, message textarea, Send Blast button
Templates tab displays all 10 templates with Active badges, edit and toggle buttons
Settings tab shows all 10 trigger settings with enable/disable toggles
Layout.js correctly adds SMS Messages to Management section with adminOnly:true flag
TerminalShell.jsx TABS array correctly has only 3 modes: Sales, PO Check, Transfers (Messages removed)
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
test_credentials: Super Admin: janmarkeahig@gmail.com / Aa@58798546521325, Manager PIN: 521325
seed_data_creation: None - used existing SMS queue data
context_for_next_testing_agent: SMS Messages moved from terminal to main app. MessagesPage.js is a full admin page with 5 tabs accessible at /messages route. Layout.js has adminOnly:true flag that hides the nav item for non-admin users. TerminalShell.jsx TABS array now only has Sales, PO Check, Transfers (Messages removed). All SMS API endpoints still working. No actual SMS gateway connected - messages are queued for external gateway app to poll.

tests_performed.test: Backend: All 22 SMS and Terminal tests
tests_performed.details: Templates, settings, queue, manual send, blast, stats, credential-pair, pairing code all working

tests_performed.test: Frontend: /messages page loads with title and stats badges
tests_performed.details: SMS Messages title with 5 pending, 2 failed, 11 total badges

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Message Queue tab with status filters
tests_performed.details: Pending(5)/Sent(2)/Failed(2)/Skipped(2) filters with counts, refresh button

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Pending messages show Mark Sent and Skip buttons
tests_performed.details: Green Mark Sent button and Skip button visible on pending messages

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Failed messages show Retry button
tests_performed.details: Retry button visible on failed messages
Customer search input, message textarea (320 char), Queue Message button
Min balance filter, branch display, message textarea, Send Blast button
10 template cards with Active badges, 10 edit buttons, 10 toggle buttons

tests_performed.test: Frontend: SMS Messages nav item in sidebar
tests_performed.details: Visible under Management section for admin user

tests_performed.test: Frontend: Terminal mode selector - Messages removed
tests_performed.details: Only Sales, PO Check, Transfers, Scan QR, Upload Doc, Settings visible - no Messages

mocked_apis.note: SMS queue stores messages but no actual SMS gateway connected. Gateway app will poll GET /api/sms/queue/pending and mark sent via PATCH /{id}/mark-sent
